name: bidda-compliance
description: 5835 cryptographically-verified regulatory compliance nodes across 34 pillars. Zero hallucination by design - every node traces to a primary legal source with avg 7 citations. Covers EU AI Act, GDPR, HIPAA, DORA, Basel III, FATF, NIS2, NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001, MiCA and 150+ frameworks across AI Governance, Cybersecurity, Banking, Healthcare, Legal, ESG and more. Also includes 203 MITRE nodes across 6 frameworks (ATT&CK, D3FEND, ATLAS, CAPEC).
